reviews.review_description: where on the floor are you supposed to click? nothing indicates anywhere it just either randomly starts or doesn't ever and you're just left clicking forever and why is the video so incredibly small and it looks like it's very very far away and no matter what i do i can't change that and why does it constantly keep asking me to update my scan every single time repeatedly over and over and over and over again when there's nothing wrong with my skin and every other app works perfectly fine with it but not this app the video is always just very far away and extremely tiny but that's when it decides to work if it ever even tries to work because most of the time you just left clicking aimlessly on the floor because it tells you to point to the floor but it doesn't tell you where doesn't tell you what to click doesn't tell you how to click it just tells you to click on the floor but why am i clicking on the floor i don't know this has to be one of the most frustrating to get to function apps ever and there's no reason why the video is so tiny and so far away every single time i've tried everything to get this to work correctly and nothing i do can make it work properly
This app is one of the most creative apps in meta store,it combined special effects with movies，and make the 3d model lifelike.I like this one very much.I hope developers can keep improving.
This is one of the best entertainment experience that I have tried on the quest store! The possibilities are endless! Good luck!
